images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a dark network operations control room, a long row of glowing cream-lit monitoring screens all calm and uniform along the wall, but the central operator chair sits empty and one console in the middle fractures and sparks with thin red fault lines, no person present. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent lines only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition, no text or logos.
